description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a vibrant, custom skin featuring a purple and pink splatter pattern and several colorful stickers, including NASA and pizza motifs. The drone has four black propellers mounted on extended arms, each with visible motor housings. The main body is rectangular with rounded edges, and a camera module is integrated at the front. The landing gear consists of short, fixed legs at the end of each arm, providing ground clearance. The surface appears hard and smooth, likely made from lightweight plastic and composite materials, with some metallic elements in the motor and structural components. The overall design is modern and playful, making it visually distinctive in an urban environment.
description: A small, quadcopter drone with a purple and pink splatter design, decorated with colorful stickers and equipped with four black propellers and a front-facing camera.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera module, two forward propellers, and the vibrant sticker-covered top surface.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the side profile, two visible propellers, and the detailed sticker art on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the drone, all four propellers, and the full extent of the custom skin.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the opposite side profile, two propellers, and the continuation of the sticker and color pattern.
